title: Waste management in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Waste management in Canada

## Services and information

### Cross-border Movement of Hazardous Waste and Hazardous Recyclable Material Regulations
International and interprovincial movement, applying for a permit for export, import, convey in transit

### Municipal solid waste management
Municipal solid waste, recycling, organics, disposal, GHGs, guidance, statistics, who does what.

### International commitments on waste
Canadian agreements, commitments and collaboration on waste.

### Extended producer responsibility
Role of extended producer reliability, product stewardship programs in managing end-of-life products.

### International movement statistics
Annual statistics from 2007 to 2017 on transboundary movements of hazardous waste and recyclables.

### Consultations on managing and reducing waste
Current and past consultations on waste management in Canada.

### Provincial, territorial and international contacts
Links to provincial, territorial, US, international organizations, competent authorities web sites.
Causes, impacts and solutions.

### Plastic waste and pollution reduction
Canadian actions on plastic waste and pollution.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
